## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it is needed.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] The change remains read-only and local-first.
- [ ] No real credentials, account exports, or personal identifiers are included.
- [ ] Collection stops on authorization, anti-bot, or persistent rate-limit errors.
- [ ] Logs and outputs do not reveal cookies or credential fields.

## Validation

- [ ] Python compilation passes.
- [ ] Offline analyzer and credential-leak tests pass.
- [ ] Exporter pagination tests pass.
- [ ] Documentation and fixtures are updated.

## Evidence

Paste concise test output or explain why a test is not applicable.
